## What changed

Describe the user-facing behavior and why it belongs in smer.

## Privacy impact

Describe any capture, credential, storage, redaction, or network implications.

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated focused tests
- [ ] Updated `lat.md/` for behavior, architecture, or test changes
- [ ] Ran `bun test`
- [ ] Ran `bun run check`
- [ ] Ran `bun run benchmark`
- [ ] Ran `lat check`
- [ ] Confirmed fixtures and output contain no private data
